name: Threshold Catchall

product_dna.core_purpose: Hold keys, jewelry, or small daily objects at an entry or bedside.
product_dna.design_philosophy: A shallow arch creates a calm boundary around everyday clutter.
product_dna.emotional_appeal: A small arrival ritual and visual order.
product_dna.target_customer: Design-conscious adults with modern entryways, desks, or nightstands.
product_dna.functional_benefits: One visible landing place for small objects.
product_dna.decorative_benefits: Architectural arch silhouette and mineral surface.
product_dna.print_complexity: Moderate; shallow bowl geometry and underside supports require testing.
product_dna.material_efficiency: Compact footprint, with mass and hollowing to be measured.
product_dna.brand_alignment: Strong Quiet Architectural form and use story.
product_dna.future_evolution: Mini valet, XL entry tray, divided premium edition, and bundle.
product_dna.physical_manufacturing_potential: Plausible in cast resin or mineral composite after compliance review.

design_tokens.corner_radius: Broad radii scaled to the arch
design_tokens.edge_language: Soft outer arch with one crisp recess
design_tokens.shadow_language: Soft basin shadow and one edge highlight
design_tokens.design_balance: Centered arch with quiet asymmetry in use

market_demand.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 show recurring tray, jewelry, entryway, and decor use language, but not resin-STL demand.

competition_opportunity.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 show many arch-tray forms and formats, implying meaningful competitive pressure.

profitability.rationale: EVD-001 and EVD-002 show low single-file prices; actual resin costs, conversion, and margin are Unknown.

evergreen_potential.rationale: EVD-004 shows enduring jewelry, nightstand, vanity, and entryway uses rather than a seasonal motif.

brand_alignment.rationale: EVD-009 marks product-specific market evidence Unknown; the arch and restrained recess strongly match internal Quiet Architectural rules.

collection_potential.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 show adjacent tray and display use cases that support multiple collection roles.

bundle_potential.rationale: EVD-007 demonstrates multi-part packaging and collection links; the catchall pairs naturally with smaller ritual objects.

physical_product_potential.rationale: EVD-004 shows physical trays across several materials, a proxy for physical-product adjacency.

seo_opportunity.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 provide clear arch tray, catchall, jewelry, entryway, and decor language but no volume data.

resin_printability.rationale: EVD-009 confirms resin validation is Unknown; compact shallow geometry appears testable but requires support and warping prototypes.

ai_production_efficiency.rationale: EVD-009 marks production evidence Unknown; the form is parametrically simple with limited detailing.

customer_value.rationale: EVD-004 repeatedly associates arch trays with jewelry, keys, vanity, and organization uses.

production_simplicity.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin production Unknown; one-piece geometry is simple but broad shallow surfaces can distort.

marketplace_fit.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 show Etsy adjacency; Cults3D-specific tray evidence remains Unknown.

risks: Support scars may affect the visible underside
